title: RetrCcast
description: RetroCast is a multi-theme web radio experience that combines vintage radio design with modern streaming. Explore live stations, tune frequencies, save presets, and enjoy a visually immersive listening interface.

title: BetMatchUp
description: BetMatchUp is a football prediction dashboard that tracks upcoming match predictions and past results in one place. Analyze forecasts, monitor prediction performance, and explore football insights through a fast, data-driven interface.

title: Diff Viewer
description: Diff Viewer is a browser-based tool that compares two files side-by-side in real time, highlighting differences across text, JSON, PDF, and code formats with fast in-browser processing and multiple diff modes for precise visual comparison.

title: Photo Landmark Discovery
description: Photo Landmark Discovery is a browser-based tool that extracts GPS metadata from uploaded images to identify real-world locations and enrich them with map views and Wikipedia context, turning photos into interactive geographic discoveries.

title: Prediction Merger
description: Prediction Merger is a browser-based tool that combines multiple football prediction JSON datasets into one unified file for easier analysis, comparison, and model evaluation, all processed locally in your browser for speed and privacy..

title: Fixture Splitter
description: Fixture Splitter is a fast, browser-based tool that pulls or uploads data from football-data.co.uk and instantly splits fixtures into clean, league-specific CSV files for easy analysis and organization.

title: Wiki Rabbit Hole
description: Wiki Rabbit Hole is an interactive tool that maps the shortest path between any two Wikipedia topics via bidirectional traversal. It features a dynamic knowledge graph, node expansion, and search suggestions, helping users visualize connections within human knowledge.

title: LocalStream
description: A serverless, browser-based personal media center. Transform your local movie and TV show folders into a cinematic streaming experience with automated artwork, progress tracking, and a Netflix-style UI.

title: WebTunes
description: WebTunes Player is an iTunes-inspired browser music player. Drag and drop local audio files, build playlists, and enjoy a sleek Apple-style interface with smooth animations and built-in visualizers.

title: Pitch-Data Pro
description: Analyze football data with ease. Upload datasets, build betting models, and backtest strategies. Generate predictions, insights, and performance tracking from real match statistics.

title: PokePricer
description: Turn eBay sold listings into Pokémon card market insights. Track price trends, filter outliers, and spot profitable deals with built-in analytics and a lightweight research workspace.

title: Osint
description: A live OSINT dashboard for tracking global conflict signals. Monitor alerts, geospatial activity, and curated feeds with powerful search, filtering, and real-time updates.

title: Zine Maker
description: Create printable 8-page pocket zines in minutes. Import content or build page-by-page with full control over layout, fonts, and images. Export print-ready designs to fold and share.

title: Wordy
description: Explore themed word search boards across tech, sci-fi, nature, and more. Smooth controls and clean animations make for a relaxed but engaging puzzle experience.

title: Defend The UK
description: Defend the UK from an incoming fleet. Strategically deploy boats, fire cannons, and manage health and score in fast-paced, arcade-style gameplay.

title: Currently
description: Save articles to read later, filter unread content, and search headlines quickly. Feeds are cached locally for speed and update in the background without interruptions.

title: Favicon Lab
description: Design, preview, and export favicons and meta tags in one place. Create using text, shapes, or uploads, then export optimized assets and ready-to-use SEO snippets.

title: Monster Tracker
description: Track energy drink habits in a neon dashboard. Monitor spending, stock, caffeine, and sugar while visualizing long-term impact—all stored locally in your browser.

title: Abstractify
description: Generate abstract art from photos with real-time controls. Experiment with styles, remix instantly, and export high-resolution visuals directly from your browser.

title: SpendScope
description: Track recurring spending and visualize how habits grow over time. Explore long-term financial impact and set fun goals through an interactive reward system.

title: AirTouch Gallery
description: Control photos and maps with webcam gestures. Pinch, zoom, rotate, and navigate hands-free with smooth, privacy-friendly processing done locally.

title: Open95
description: A browser-based retro OS inspired by Windows 95. Includes a working desktop, classic apps, and a built-in marketplace with free software.

title: Tune 3310
description: Create nostalgic Nokia 3310-style ringtones by tapping out melodies. A simple, playful tool inspired by classic mobile sounds.

title: TimeBox
description: A cinematic 3D word clock that transforms time into a glowing visual scene. Customize motion and lighting or let it run as an ambient display.

title: PromptVault
description: Organize and reuse AI prompts in a clean, offline workspace. Search, edit, and store ideas with a distraction-free writing experience.

title: Sonar
description: A retro naval strategy game inspired by Battleship. Use sonar pings, outsmart AI, and hunt ships in quick, tactical rounds with a CRT-style interface.

title: JobHunter
description: A private job-hunting dashboard with Kanban tracking, CV tools, and interview prep. Everything runs offline and stays securely on your device.

title: Sound Canvas
description: Turn audio into customizable visual art. Adjust styles in real time and export shareable visuals with minimal effort.

title: Split PDF
description: Split PDFs directly in your browser by page count or equal parts. Fast, simple, and completely private with no uploads required.

title: MetaView
description: Preview how links appear on social and search. Edit titles, descriptions, and images live, then export clean, copy-ready meta tags.

title: LifeStats
description: Turn your age into relatable stats like heartbeats, sleep, and steps. A playful way to visualize time and make abstract numbers feel real.

title: StreamPack
description: A self-hosted tool for organizing shows and movies onto USB storage. Auto-group episodes, manage queues, and track space usage with ease.
